scenario.name: SIPREC INVITE replay (Cisco CUBE)
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:srs@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=tls SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:cube-recorder@cisco-cube.example.com>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:srs@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:cube-recorder@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tls> Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, BYE, OPTIONS, INFO, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY, UPDATE, PRACK Require: siprec User-Agent: Cisco-SIPGateway/IOS-17.13.1a Content-Type: multipart/mixed;boundary=cube-boundary-7e1f23 Content-Length: [len]
--cube-boundary-7e1f23 Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=CiscoSystemsSIP-GW-UserAgent 1234 5678 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=SIP Call c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [auto_media_port] RTP/SAVP 0 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20 a=label:1 a=sendonly a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:WVNfX19zZGUgZmFrZSBzcnRwIGtleSAwMDAxMjM0NQ== --cube-boundary-7e1f23 Content-Type: application/rs-metadata+xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <recording xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:recording:1"> <session session_id="[field0]" state="active"/> <participant participant_id="agent-[call_number]"><nameID aor="sip:agent@cube.example.com"/></participant> <stream stream_id="s1" session_id="[field0]"><label>1</label></stream> <participantstreamassoc participant_id="agent-[call_number]"><send>s1</send></participantstreamassoc> </recording> --cube-boundary-7e1f23--

ACK sip:srs@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=tls SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:cube-recorder@cisco-cube.example.com>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:srs@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:srs@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=tls SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:cube-recorder@cisco-cube.example.com>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:srs@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
